item.title: King Juice Company, Inc.: Calypso Tropic Tango Lemonade. 16 FL oz (1PT) (473 ML). Recall
item.product: Calypso Tropic Tango Lemonade. 16 FL oz (1PT) (473 ML).
item.summary: Product contains undeclared Yellow No. 5. Product details: Calypso Tropic Tango Lemonade. 16 FL oz (1PT) (473 ML). UPC 0 79581-18709 7. Keep Refrigerated After Opening. King Juice Company, Inc., Milwaukee, Wisconsin 53221.
item.affectedPeople: Nationwide. Outside the US to Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, and Trinidad and Tobago
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 299,779 cases (12 bottles per case)
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
